title: Shik
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Shik'''" was an epithet (or at least a noun) used by [[Waverton]] to refer to [[Podlong Foahl]]. It may have been a derogatory term for a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]], or something similar to "grunt" or "peon" (since Foahl was employed by Waverton in their cover identities and possibly ranked below him in their [[Pressure pirates|pressure pirate]] band).

==Appearances==
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 1]]
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 2]]
